{{Quote|When we do appear, we can be killers…but also healers. Thank the Force for that.|Sirrus|<ref name="SWR" />}}
'''Sirrus''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. He was also the master of [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] [[Aubrie Wyn]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Human/Legends|Human]], Sirrus was [[Jedi training/Legends|educated]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually attaining the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. Selecting the [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Aubrie Wyn]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], he nurtured her gift for [[Force healing/Legends|Force healing]] until she was marked for special training with Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].<ref name="SWR" />

However, before Sirrus could see Wyn through to her full potential, both were forced to take active roles in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Taking up the mantle of [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Master Sirrus and his Padawan were dispatched to [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]] to fight in the [[Battle of Jabiim|campaign]] there. Under the command of Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], Sirrus joined Kenobi in battle, dying when [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] forces destroyed one of the Republic's [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|walkers]].<ref name="SWR" />

Sirrus also kept a [[Master Sirrus's holocron|holocron]] on his person, for reasons unknown. He gave this holocron to his Padawan during the Battle of Jabiim, who then gave it to [[Anakin Skywalker]], so he could return it to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
